title: Expressions of interest issued on behalf of Industrial Injuries Advisory Council (IIAC)
body: "If you are interested in participating in one or both projects and would like further information, please e-mail  caxtonhouse.iiac@dwp.gov.uk for the attention of  Ian Chetland.     Please state which LOT you are interested in and provide brief details of your organisation including details of your expertise relevant to the LOTs.   Closing date is 11.59pm on 26 February 2025.  "
